name: dbt-wiki
description: Local-only two-layer knowledge base for dbt projects — semantic Q&A over manifest + column lineage.

interface.shortDescription: Local two-layer knowledge base for dbt — semantic Q&A over manifest + column lineage
interface.longDescription: Use dbt-wiki to build a local-only knowledge base for a dbt project: init scaffolds pages, a lineage DAG, and CLAUDE.md from manifest.json + compiled SQL (sqlglot column lineage) + inline comments; ingest records tribal knowledge (sort_key rationale, dialect gotchas, incident links) into per-model User Notes that survive a rescan; and query answers semantic questions over the result. update / rescan / redistill / review / pack keep it current.
defaultPrompt: Add a note that fct_orders' sort_key is tuned for incremental merges.
